stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":2,"creativity-free-response":"The game didn't really offer much in the way of creativity. there was no story, there wasn't much gameplay.","originality-rating":1,"originality-free-response":"I've played similar games before where you don't have direct control of your character. There was no challenge, no gameplay mechanics.","effectiveness-rating":1,"effectiveness-free-response":"It was pretty boring and I was largely just clicking randomly to progress. My input mattered very little so long as I kept it moving right. ","authenticity-rating":1,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":1,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"There was nothing about the game that really shouted intentionality. The experience was hollow. "}
